rows.label: qev090806_MSG0001
rows.name:
I heard name of Blood-king many
times during war with Cavern Clan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090806_MSG0002
rows.name:
He is most fearsome and terrible
Bias warrior. Uses cruelty like
cudgel to crush will of enemies.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090806_MSG0003
rows.name:
He is terrible foe, but you
are strong. You must get
revenge for Pulala's friend![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090806_MSG0004
rows.name:
What happened with Blood-king? If
he is dead, hurry and tell Pulala![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090806_MSG0005
rows.name:
She is full of fear and hate for him.
It is hard to see her like this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090806_MSG0006
rows.name:
I asked friends to help find lair
of Blood-king. None can help.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090806_MSG0007
rows.name:
It is up to you and fancy
Earth-alien machines! I know
you can find where he hides.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090806_MSG0008
rows.name:
I do not want to see
Pulala suffer any more.[ST:wait ]
